# Changelog

Generated from git conventional commits.

## Recent Changes

### Features

- **doc-suite**: Add full documentation suite — analyze, generate, validate, coverage commands
- **doc-orchestrator**: Coordinate doc pipeline with parallel per-module execution
- **doc agents**: Add doc-analyzer, doc-generator, doc-validator, doc-reporter agents
- **doc skills**: Add doc-analysis and doc-quality-scoring skills
- **doc-coverage-reminder**: PostToolUse hook for undocumented export reminders
- **interactive diff review**: Default install mode with per-file accept/keep/smart-merge
- **--no-interactive flag**: Forward from install.sh to orchestrator
- **unchanged tracking**: Add unchanged category to MergeReport
- **contentsDiffer**: Byte-level file comparison utility
- **single-process test runner**: Shared harness eliminating per-file tsx startup
- **arch-review**: Architecture quality audit command and agent
- **architecture-review skill**: Audit checklist for layering, coupling, DDD compliance
- **atomic commits**: Embed atomic commit steps in 3 commands, 6 agents
- **stop-uncommitted-reminder**: Hook to remind about uncommitted changes
- **LCS diff**: Colored side-by-side diff display for install conflicts
- **auto-detect language**: `ecc install` detects language automatically
- **smart merge**: Plugin detection, merge, and gitignore management
- **TypeScript migration**: 7-phase migration from JavaScript to TypeScript

### Documentation

- Update CLAUDE.md with doc system commands and test counts
- Regenerate codemaps for doc system and test runner changes
- Add /arch-review to CLAUDE.md key commands
- Generate initial CODEMAPS for architecture, backend, data, dependencies
- Sync documentation with TypeScript migration

### Tests

- Add doc system hook and validation tests (36 tests)
- Migrate test suite to single-process runner
- Add shared test harness
- Add tests for hook-flags, cost-tracker, validate-no-personal-paths
- Add realistic legacy hook cleanup integration test

### Refactoring

- Migrate test suite to single-process runner
- Remove numbered directory prefixes, align with npm CLI conventions

### Fixes

- Forward --no-interactive flag from install.sh to orchestrator
- Resolve CI failures — lint, hooks validator, test alignment
- Fix continuous-learning-v2 observer background process crashes
- Exclude .history/ directory from doc file warning
- Audit and fix shell completion

| 1.0.10 | Hook-flags, cost-tracker, atomic commits |
| 1.0.9 | Stop-uncommitted-reminder, atomic commit convention |
| 1.0.8 | TypeScript migration (7 phases) |
| 1.0.7 | Upstream sync v1.8.0, directory restructure |

| 1.0.3 | .gitignore prompt for settings.local.json |

| 1.0.1 | Professional npm CLI with omelette completion |
| 1.0.0 | Initial release |
